title: Service Team Response Preparation
team_context: Synthetic service team reviewing whether AI can help prepare draft response notes for routine inbound questions.
workflow_summary: A human receives a service inquiry, uses AI to draft a missing-information checklist and possible escalation note, then a named human writes and sends the final response.
ai_use_case: AI may summarize public-safe inquiry context, suggest missing questions, and flag possible escalation. AI may not send messages, make promises, decide eligibility, or provide professional advice.
recommended_controls: Use synthetic or redacted context during pilots.
Name a human reviewer for every final customer-facing response.
Require human approval before any message is sent or posted.
Escalate legal, medical, payment, employment, security, or distress signals to the correct owner.
Stop the pilot if customers are confused, distressed, misrouted, or given unsupported promises.
not_for: financial, tax, insurance, or investment advice
notes: Synthetic example only. No customer records, credentials, account data, private candidate data, or production systems are represented.
